description: Read contents of one or more files. Text/code files return raw content with rich metadata (language, line count, file size). PDF/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX are converted to text/markdown. Binary files return data:...;base64,... format. Supports partial reads via start/limit, tail (last N lines), multi-segment ranges, line number display, encoding override, and metadata-only mode. Example: {"files": [{"path": "main.go", "start": 1, "limit": 50, "line_numbers": true}]}
name: read_file

line_numbers.description: Optional. Show line numbers on the left side of each line. Default false.

tail.description: Optional. Read the last N lines of the file. Overrides start/limit.

encoding.description: Optional. File encoding (utf-8, gbk, shift-jis, big5, euc-jp, etc.). Default 'auto' which detects encoding automatically.

info.description: Optional. Only return file metadata (name, size, lines, mod time, encoding), no content. Default false.

ranges.description: Optional. Multi-segment read. Array of [start, end] pairs, e.g. [[1,20], [100,150]]. Overrides start/limit/tail.
